Vehicle Evaluation Report

{{ doc.name }}

Vehicle Details

Manufacturer: {{ doc.manufacturer }}

Model: {{ doc.model }}

Year: {{ doc.year }}

Vehicle Images

{% if doc.vehicle_image %} {% endif %}

Inspection Checklist

{% for item in doc.evaluation_checklist %} {% endfor %}
Parameter Rating
{{ item.rating }}

Evaluation Summary

Refurbishment Cost: ₹ {{ doc.refurbishment_cost }}

Recommended Price: ₹ {{ doc.recommended_price }}

Evaluator Notes

{{ doc.notes }}

Final Verdict: {{ doc.verdict }}

Evaluator Signature: ______________________

Date: {{ frappe.utils.today() }}

Scan for Verification
name: Vehicle Evaluation Report

html:
CONSULTING REPORT

Report No: {{ doc.name }}

Date: {{ doc.creation }}

Consultant: {{ doc.assigned_consultant }}

Vehicle Details (Client Provided)

Registration: {{ doc.registration_number }}

Manufacturer: {{ doc.manufacturer }}

Model: {{ doc.model }}

Year: {{ doc.year }}

Findings & Risk Analysis

{% for row in doc.recommendations %} {% endfor %}
Aspect Observation Risk Level
{{ row.area_of_inspection }} {{ row.observation }} {{ row.risk_level }}

Final Recommendation

{{ doc.final_recommendation }}

Supporting Rationale

{{ doc.rationale }}

Consultant Signature: ______________________

Date: {{ frappe.utils.today() }}

This report is based on the information and inspection available at the time of evaluation. The consultancy firm is not liable for any future discrepancies or hidden defects.
name: Consulting Report
